name: Ginger Chicken (Microwave Method)
recipeInstructions:
1. Loosen the skin around the chicken by sliding a chopstick between the meat and skin, poking into thighs, legs, from the back and over the breast.
2. Wash and dry the chicken, and salt the cavity and outside.
3. Mix soy sauce, sugar, ginger, and sherry in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture inside the chicken skin, turning the chicken so the mix penetrates all around the chicken.
5. To freeze: wrap the chicken tightly in plastic wrap and place it whole in a gallon ziploc freezer bag.
6. Freeze for later use.
7. To prepare: thaw the wrapped chicken before cooking.
8. Place the chicken breast down in a microwave-safe cooking dish and cover with Stretch-Tite or plastic wrap.
9. Cook on High for 12 minutes, then turn the chicken breast up and continue cooking covered with Stretch-Tite for another 13 minutes.
10. Cut the chicken up on a platter for serving and top with the juices.
11. Serve with steamed rice, stir-fried vegetables, fortune cookies, and tea.
